name: Formula One 2016
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings and driver-suffixed livery names extracted from the community F-Ultimate_Gen1.xml custom-AI set

skinPacks.name: F1 2016 Season skinpack (matches F-Ultimate_Gen1.xml livery names)

notes: AI ratings are EXTRACTED verbatim from the base entries of the local F-Ultimate_Gen1.xml NAMeS file (race_skill, qualifying_skill, etc.); they are not authored.
Class F-Ultimate_Gen1 maps to the single vehicle formula_ultimate_2016 (verified against data/ams2/classes.json + vehicles.json).

Mid-season driver swap modeled from f1db: Verstappen (Toro Rosso #33 rounds 1-4 â†’ Red Bull #33 rounds 5-21) and Kvyat (Red Bull #26 rounds 1-4 â†’ Toro Rosso #26 rounds 5-21), each carried as two entries.
Substitutions: Vandoorne (McLaren #47) raced only round 2 in place of Alonso, who missed Bahrain (Alonso rounds 1,3-21). Manor #88 Haryanto (rounds 1-12) was replaced by #31 Ocon (rounds 13-21).

The source custom-AI XML also carries a large per-track (tracks="...") override set; those patches are not carried into this pack's aiOverrides in this version.
